verses.text: Hong pai un, Topa phat ni. Eite a hong hu, a hong honkhiapa tungah lungdamna la sa ni
Ama omna-ah lungdamna ko-in pai ni. Phatna late, ama tungah lungdam takin sa ni
Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa, a lian Pasian hi a, pasian khempeuh tungah Kumpi lianpa ahi hi
Amah in leitung khempeuh uk a, guam thuk pen panin mual sang pen dawn dongin amah in a uk hi
Ama bawlsa tuipite uk a, ama bawlsa leitung zong amah in a uk hi
Hong pai un, amah bia-in kun ni. Eite hong Bawl Topa' mai-ah khukdin' ni
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen eite' Pasian hi a, eite pen ama hong kep mite leh ama khutsunga om a tuute ihi hi. Tuni-in hih bangin ama hong thugen za un
Amaute in ka nasepna mu khin uh hinapi, Meribah leh Massah munah na pate un kei hong ze-etin, gamtatna tawh ka lah ding hong kalh hun lai uh bangin, note in na lungsim uh khauhsak kei un
Kum sawmli sung tua minam ka kih a, “Amaute pen a lungsim uhah a khial mi hi a, amaute in ka thupiakte manglo uh hi,” ka ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin keima nopsakna munah amaute a lutlo dingin sinso kawmin ka kiciam hi.
